title: Update HTML Page Titles for Analytics and Tracking
description:
Update HTML page titles across the application to standardize naming for analytics and tracking purposes.

### Page Titles
- `/login` -> "DataTools Login"
- `/dashboard` -> "DataTools Objects"
- `/object/{name}?view=dictionary` -> "DataTools Object"
- `/entity-relationships` -> "DataTools ERD"
- `/metrics` -> "DataTools Metrics"
acceptance_criteria: All page titles match the specified naming convention
Analytics tools correctly capture the new page titles
ux_changes: Browser tab titles updated to standardized DataTools naming convention.
implementation_notes: Needed for Pendo and other analytics tracking tools to properly identify pages.
comment_summary: Task was prioritized for analytics tracking setup. Developer completed and submitted for review quickly.
